emails.subject: Exotics
emails.body: Exotics Our net nymex equivalent position for today's exotics portolio is 21 contracts I changed the pubcode for the spread options from a basis curve (CGPR-AECO/BASIS) to a Fixed Price Curve (AECOUS) so hopefully this will help us reconcile.

emails.subject: Exotics
emails.body: Exotics Robin I just have a question for item 2) Some of the deals are multimonth deals. How can I have a uniquie master deal id for each line if there is only one TAGG number for all of the months and I need to break out each month separately. Kathy Robin Rodrigue 07/06/2000 04:50 PM

emails.subject: Re: Exotics
emails.body: Re: Exotics Kathy, I just spoke with Gary Stadler and he said the number doesn't really matter for our purposes but it must be unique for the system. He suggested you just make it a consecutive numbering down the file. Robin
